initial_location_description: A thick, claustrophobic thicket of tangled bushes and gnarled tree roots at the edge of the Swordsmith Village. The air is misty, and the sky is a deep indigo transitioning into a pale morning orange.
initial_bgm: Tense and cinematic orchestral with driving percussion

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The scent of fear and old blood hangs heavy in the air. The true Hantengu, a pathetic, mouse-sized creature, scurries desperately through the undergrowth.
main_dialogue.tone: Gritty and immersive, building suspense through low-frequency narration.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: brush rustling and rapid tiny footsteps

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I can see you! You won't escape... not this time! [heavy breathing] I have to end this before the sun rises!
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and strained, voice cracking with exhaustion and resolve.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.tone: A guttural, focused shout that resonates with power and spiritual focus.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A brilliant arc of crimson fire cuts through the darkness. The blade find its mark, severing the tiny neck of the demon in a single, blazing stroke.
main_dialogue.tone: Epic and triumphant, though laced with the weight of the finality.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] It's... it's finally over. He's crumbling away. We... we did it, Nezuko.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted and relieved, the vocal chords sounding dry and worn out.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: But the relief is short-lived. As the demon vanishes, the canopy above thins out. The first direct rays of the sun pierce through the trees, striking the ground with golden heat.
main_dialogue.tone: Suddenly urgent and ominous, shifting from triumph to immediate dread.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: The sun? No... wait! Nezuko, get down!
main_dialogue.tone: Sudden, sharp terror. A high-pitched realization of immediate danger.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.tone: Muffled by the bamboo, but clearly expressing agony and physical shock.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad expression, furrowed brows, teary eyes looking downward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Stay behind me! I'll protect you, just hang on!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hysterical and fiercely protective, sobbing through the command.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro throws himself over his sister, his own body acting as a shield against the rising sun as her skin begins to smoke.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tragic and intense, focusing on the bond between the siblings.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Desperately search for the wooden box!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: The box! Where is it?! I have to get her inside right now!
branching_dialogue.tone: Frantic and disjointed, eyes scanning the area with wild desperation.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: He looks back to where the box fell during the struggle, but the distance is too great. The sun is rising faster than he can reach it.
branching_dialogue.tone: Hopeless and heavy, emphasizing the cruelty of the timing.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A rocky, open plateau at the edge of the forest. The sun's golden rim is visible over the mountains, casting long shadows and illuminating the dust in the air. Nezuko is standing in a patch of direct light.
